ddt:Target.Name: CD3_EV_CK_SCCM_V1_2
ddt:Target.Description:
====================================== Steering column control module - [SUV][EV] Supplier: Calsonic Kensai (CK) ====================================== 2019-03-13 (Not uploaded in server) v1.0: Initial database, Based on SCCM_DTC_V2.4 (Nissan equivalent N_P42Q_ADP(SCCM)_UDS_VC_20190307.xml)
2019-08-27, v1.1 (Update based on SCCM_DTC_V2.7) Delete $020C User guidance function Add configuration, IO control screen
2019-10-07 v1.2 - Generic ECU name change to include XCB - Applicable: SW2b(SCCM_02b4), SW3(SCCM_0303)

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Item.Text: Only SW function enabled( Downgraded Mode)
Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ResetMemory_start
Request.Comment: Reset user profile memory when Seat ECU changes

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ResetMemory_status
Request.Comment: Reset user profile memory when Seat ECU changes

Request.Name: RoutineControl.ResetMemory_stop
Request.Comment: Reset user profile memory when Seat ECU changes

Test.Description: TILT MOTOR "[ Commanded position not reachable ]"
TILT MOTOR "[ Not Adjusted ]"
TILT SENSOR "[ circuit short to GND ]"
TILT SENSOR "[ circuit short to battery ]"
TILT SENSOR "[ No signal ]"
TELESCOPIC MOTOR "[ Commanded position not reachable ]"
TELESCOPIC MOTOR "[ Not Adjusted ]"
TELESCOPIC SENSOR "[ circuit short to GND ]"
TELESCOPIC SENSOR "[ circuit short to battery ]"
TELESCOPIC SENSOR "[ No signal ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ TILT MOTOR driver circuit failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ Internal power supply failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ Data memory failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ Program memory failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ ICalibration/parameter memory failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ ICalibration/parameter memory failure ]"
Steering Column Control ECU "[ Not configured ]"
BCM_DTCMux (Missing message)
USM_DTCMux (Missing message)
AT/CVT_DTCMux (Missing message)
DSMU_DTCMux (Missing message)
'VDC(ESC)_DTCMux (Missing message)
'IVI_DTCMux (Missing message)
'ACU_DTCMux(Missing Message)
'METER_DTCMux (Missing message)
VehicleSpeed "[ Invalid Data ]"
